content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — Paywall footnote text "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" in App/PaywallView.swift:11 explicitly offers a reward for a review.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans quid-pro-quo review incentives under 2.3.9 and this can trigger rejection since it manipulates App Store ratings with a free-premium reward. Found in App/PaywallView.swift line 11 — remove this string and instead use SKStoreReviewController's standard, non-incentivized prompt (Guideline 1.1's §25 scan already covers the proper API usage).
